## Problem

What limitation or missing behavior are you trying to address?

## Proposed change

Describe the feature at a high level.

## Impacted areas

- [ ] World
- [ ] Band / formation
- [ ] Rhythm battle
- [ ] Autoloads
- [ ] Content data
- [ ] Docs / workflow

## Acceptance criteria

List the observable outcomes needed for this to be done.
